text:
Once upon a time in a quiet town nestled amongst rolling green hillsides lived a curious little fox. People didn little hats with fur tails. They loved fox hats. Every autumn they'd celebrate the fox hat festival.

Our friend Little Otter hadn't got any fur hat. That's why he was exceptionally happy.

One evening, after hearing the cheerful songs, he poked his tiny nose into Owl OlitiaOIya. Owl wore a big owl hat.

"Don't think you've heard my voice," said Owl.

Justify-O-Owl-o-o...

Little Otter chimed in. "That wasn't an owl. That was you!"

Owl stared at him. There wasn't an feather on his head.

Little Otter grinned. "Oh! I think I'll wear my big ribbon hat today."

He spun around with his ribbon admirably.

What do you think Owl saw?

Oh-right.

A big, clumsy turtle.

Now that thought wasn't so cute...

Oh-right.
